text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it seems the competition's heated back up. 
With only two events left, I suppose that means we're 
approaching the climax.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, are you ready for the 2000 meter race, Digital-kun? 
Or should I say——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Are you ready to answer Tap-kun's burning passion?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aha. Hahaha. Ha… To be perfectly honest, 
I'm honored she feels that way. TOO honored. 
I feel like a dam about to burst.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You know, I was, well… I was too obsessed to see.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mean… I mean, come on!! 
I love every Uma to death! I love love love love LOVE them!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I love them on turf! I love them on dirt! In the regionals, the 
nationals, and all over the world!! I can't choose between them, 
and I don't WANT to choose between them! I love them all!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That love pushed me forward, and let me run!! 
No matter where I was, or what I was doing… 
You were all so awe-inspiring——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My infinite love for you all gave me strength. 
It carried me to where I am now. 
…So now I realize——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's something I have to do today. 
…Something only I can do.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, anyway! Sorry, but I must go now, Tachyon-san! 
Your humble servant Digitan is off to the 2000 meter race!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ……Yes, you enjoy yourself, now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
——The workings of your mind and speech are cryptic as ever. 
But that's exactly what makes you so unexpectedly entertaining.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Honestly. You are nothing if not my roommate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (——Let's write a story.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Instead of a pen, we'll write it with our legs, our bodies, and 
our hearts. I'll look you right in the eyes, and flash you 
a brave smile——)

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: ……Hey now, there's a new look on your face. Haha. Finally ready to take me seriously, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ……Heh heh. Yes I am.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you want a taste of the weight of the autumn shield? 
Or would you like to try the strength that took on the world 
for size?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whichever you want to see, your wish is my command. 
After all—— I'm the invincible all-rounder.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Yes, let's write a story! 
The perfect story of your dreams, written just for you!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Tap-san… You were willing to set your gaze on me, of 
all people… So I'll answer your gaze as much as I can!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Allow me to play the role… 
Of Final Boss Digitan!!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Come at me with everything you've got. 
You think you can claim me as your treasure? 
Then go ahead and try!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Ha… Hahaha, HAHAHAHAHAH! Hell yeah, Digital… Now we're gettin' somewhere! ——You're on!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Now, c'mon, let's go!! 
HAAAAAAAAHHHH!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And they're off for the 2000 meter race! Tap Dance City's 
opening things with a powerful early lead! She accelerates 
in a flash! S-She's showing no signs of slowing down!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text: What… What an audacious runawayyyyyyy!!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
(What, you think I'm reckless? Just going crazy? Nah!! 
I'm serious!! DEAD serious!! Right here, right now——)

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: (I'm gonna knock you down, Agnes Digital…!!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(I hear you, Tap-san—— I can feel it! 
I can feel how desperately you're trying to beat me!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (I'm going to answer that passion! Even if it kills me——!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(There's a simple reason why!! 
If my oshi tells me she wants to hear my voice… 
If she tells me she wants me to give my all!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Even if I'm out of breath!! Even if I'm dead on the ground!! 
I'll shout and shout, 'till my lungs burst!! AND ANSWER HER!!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (THIS… IS AN OTAKU'S PRIIIIIIIIIIDEEE!!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
——The race isn't over yet, Tap-san!! 
On my pride as an otaku, I'm catching up to you, 
no matter what…!!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Huff…! Heh…! 
Oh no you don't! I wanna keep seein' you burning hot!!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
'Till the very last second—— 
I'm gonna make you chase me down!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
——That's the raaaaaaaaaaace!! 
The winner of this fierce 2000 meter race is——

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
For the white team, Agnes Digital!! 
Tap Dance City's massive runaway couldn't escape her 
incredible skills!!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Huff… Huff… Hahhhh… 
——Aw, shit!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Bwargh!? A-A-A-A-A-A-Are you all right, Tap-shan!? 
L-Let me see your hand… Wait, no, look, don't touch… 
No, no, now's not the time to be——!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Hey, where'd the cool Digital go, huh? Not that it matters, really.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
——This ain't the last you'll see of me!! 
You got that, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh…? Erm, d-do you mean… you want to race again…?

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Of course! Next time… Yeah, I really wanna race you at a G1. Actually, while I'm at it—— I wanna have a big ol' bash at a Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
I don't care what I gotta win to make it into that race. 
I'm runnin' my way up there, no matter what. 
So you better be there, too, you got that, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Let's you and me have another showdown sometime. 
…Promise?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ～～～!! (GOOD GRAVY, SHE'S H-A-W-T!!!!!!!!!!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
P- PROMISE!! 
Next time, hmm, maybe I'll, er, play a royal character or 
something!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Man, who said anything about playing a character? I want you! Ahahahaha!!
